Entries.Title: TV5
Entries.Description: TV5 is a major Philippine television network offering a mix of local and international programming, including news, entertainment, and sports.

Entries.Title: GMA PinoyTV
Entries.Description: GMA PinoyTV is an international channel broadcasting popular Filipino shows, including dramas, news, and variety programs, to overseas audiences.

Entries.Title: Thrill
Entries.Description: Thrill is a channel dedicated to high-octane action movies, crime dramas, and suspenseful thrillers from around the world.

Entries.Title: HBO Asia
Entries.Description: HBO Asia offers a premium selection of Hollywood blockbusters, original series, and exclusive content for movie and TV enthusiasts.

Entries.Title: ROCK Action (loop)
Entries.Description: ROCK Action is a looped channel featuring non-stop action movies and adrenaline-pumping entertainment for fans of the genre.

Entries.Title: HITS Movies
Entries.Description: HITS Movies is a channel featuring a curated selection of popular Hollywood and international films, including blockbusters and classics.

Entries.Title: DreamWorks (Tagalized)
Entries.Description: DreamWorks (Tagalized) is a channel showcasing popular animated films and series from DreamWorks, dubbed in Filipino for local audiences.

Entries.Title: HBO Family Asia
Entries.Description: HBO Family Asia offers family-friendly movies, animated features, and educational content suitable for viewers of all ages.

Entries.Title: One Sport+
Entries.Description: One Sport+ is a dedicated sports channel covering local and international sporting events, including basketball, football, and more.

Entries.Title: PBA Rush
Entries.Description: PBA Rush is the official channel of the Philippine Basketball Association, featuring live games, highlights, and exclusive content.

Entries.Title: NBA TV Philippines
Entries.Description: NBA TV Philippines brings live NBA games, highlights, and analysis to Filipino basketball fans, featuring the biggest stars and matchups.

Entries.Title: Premier Sports
Entries.Description: Premier Sports is a premium sports channel featuring live coverage of tennis, football, and other major sporting events from around the world.

Entries.Title: SPOTV
Entries.Description: SPOTV is a leading sports network in Asia, broadcasting live events, including baseball, basketball, and motorsports, with expert commentary.

Entries.Title: Cartoonito Asia
Entries.Description: Cartoonito Asia is a children's channel offering educational and entertaining animated shows for preschoolers and young kids.

Entries.Title: Cartoon Network Asia
Entries.Description: Cartoon Network Asia is a popular kids' channel featuring beloved animated series, including Adventure Time, Ben 10, and more.

Entries.Title: Animax Asia
Entries.Description: Animax Asia is the premier destination for anime fans, featuring popular Japanese anime series and movies with English subtitles or dubbing.

Entries.Title: Mr. Bean
Entries.Description: Mr. Bean is a channel dedicated to the iconic British comedy character, featuring episodes of the classic series and animated adaptations.

Entries.Title: Cartoon Classic
Entries.Description: Cartoon Classic is a nostalgic channel featuring timeless animated series and cartoons from the golden age of animation.

Entries.Title: Moonbug Kids
Entries.Description: Moonbug Kids is a children's channel featuring popular shows like CoComelon, Blippi, and more, designed to entertain and educate young viewers.

Entries.Title: Asian Food Network
Entries.Description: Asian Food Network is a culinary channel showcasing delicious recipes, cooking shows, and food adventures from across Asia.

Entries.Title: Animal Planet Asia
Entries.Description: Animal Planet Asia offers captivating documentaries and shows about wildlife, pets, and the natural world, appealing to animal lovers of all ages.

Entries.Title: History Asia
Entries.Description: History Asia brings history to life with documentaries, series, and specials covering ancient civilizations, world wars, and historical mysteries.

Entries.Title: Discovery Asia (loop)
Entries.Description: Discovery Asia (loop) is a non-stop channel featuring popular documentaries and shows from Discovery, covering science, nature, and technology.

Entries.Title: Knowledge Channel
Entries.Description: Knowledge Channel is an educational TV network in the Philippines, providing curriculum-based content for students and lifelong learners.

Entries.Title: Trvl Channel
Entries.Description: Trvl Channel is a travel and adventure network featuring breathtaking destinations, cultural experiences, and travel tips for globetrotters.

Entries.Title: HITS Now
Entries.Description: HITS Now is a music channel featuring the latest hits, music videos, and chart-topping songs from international and local artists.

Entries.Title: Food Network Asia
Entries.Description: Food Network Asia is a culinary channel featuring cooking shows, competitions, and recipes from top chefs and food enthusiasts.

Entries.Title: TLC Asia
Entries.Description: TLC Asia offers lifestyle programming, including home improvement, fashion, and reality shows, inspiring viewers to explore new interests.

Entries.Title: AXN Asia
Entries.Description: AXN Asia is a leading entertainment channel featuring action-packed series, crime dramas, and reality shows from around the world.

Entries.Title: Channel News Asia
Entries.Description: Channel News Asia is a trusted news network providing in-depth coverage of regional and global events, business, and current affairs.

Entries.Title: BBC News SD
Entries.Description: BBC News SD provides global news coverage, analysis, and documentaries from the British Broadcasting Corporation, a leader in journalism.

Entries.Title: Uaap Varsity Channel
Entries.Description: Uaap Varsity Channel covers collegiate sports events in the Philippines, featuring games from the University Athletic Association of the Philippines.

Entries.Title: ANC HD
Entries.Description: ANC HD is the premier news channel in the Philippines, providing 24/7 coverage of local and international news, business, and current affairs.

Entries.Title: One Sports
Entries.Description: Sports channel covering local and international games.

Entries.Title: TAP TV
Entries.Description: Entertainment channel featuring movies and series.

Entries.Description: Entertainment channel with edgy and alternative content.

Entries.Title: Tap Sports
Entries.Description: Sports channel featuring local and international events.

Entries.Title: Tap Movies
Entries.Description: Movie channel featuring Filipino and international films.

Entries.Title: Tap Action Flix
Entries.Description: Action movie channel featuring high-octane films.

Entries.Title: CCTV4
Entries.Description: Chinese international news and entertainment channel.

Entries.Title: Arirang Korea
Entries.Description: Korean international news and culture channel.

Entries.Title: BBC Earth
Entries.Description: Documentary channel featuring nature and science programs.

Entries.Title: Premier Sports 2
Entries.Description: Secondary sports channel from Premier Sports.

Entries.Title: WWE Network
Entries.Description: Professional wrestling channel featuring WWE events and shows.

Entries.Title: History
Entries.Description: Documentary channel featuring historical events and series.

Entries.Title: Animal Planet
Entries.Description: Documentary channel focused on animals and wildlife.

Entries.Title: Fashion TV
Entries.Description: Fashion and lifestyle channel showcasing runway shows and trends.

Entries.Title: Food Network
Entries.Description: Cooking and food-related programming.

Entries.Title: EWTN Africa Asia (720p)
Entries.Description: Catholic religious programming for Africa and Asia.

Entries.Title: Zarok TV Sorani (720p)
Entries.Description: Kurdish children's channel broadcasting in Sorani dialect.

Entries.Title: Bloomberg
Entries.Description: Financial news and market updates.

Entries.Title: Outdoor Channel
Entries.Description: Channel dedicated to outdoor activities like hunting and fishing.

Entries.Title: Thrillers
Entries.Description: Movie channel specializing in thriller and suspense films.

Entries.Title: Bein Sports Xtra
Entries.Description: Sports channel featuring football and other events.

Entries.Title: MovieSphere
Entries.Description: Movie channel featuring a variety of films.

Entries.Title: 3ABN Kids
Entries.Description: Christian children's programming.

Entries.Title: Blues TV
Entries.Description: Music channel dedicated to blues music.

Entries.Title: Japanim TV (1080p)
Entries.Description: Japanese animation channel featuring anime series.

Entries.Title: Kuriakos Kids (1080p)
Entries.Description: Christian children's channel with educational content.

Entries.Title: Persiana Junior
Entries.Description: Persian-language children's channel.

Entries.Title: 30A We Love Cars
Entries.Description: Channel dedicated to car culture and automotive enthusiasts.

Entries.Title: Canal Motor (720p)
Entries.Description: Portuguese channel focused on motorsports and cars.

Entries.Title: Choppertown (720p)
Entries.Description: Channel dedicated to motorcycle culture and events.

Entries.Title: Fun Roads TV (720p)
Entries.Description: Travel and road trip channel featuring scenic routes and destinations.

Entries.Title: Garage TV Latin America
Entries.Description: Latin American channel focused on car restoration and mechanics.

Entries.Title: Retro TV (KCKS-LD9) (480p)
Entries.Description: Retro television channel featuring classic TV shows.

Entries.Title: A2Z (ABS-CBN)
Entries.Description: A2Z is a Philippine free-to-air blocktime broadcast television network based in Quezon City, with its studios located in Ortigas Center, Pasig. It serves as a flagship property of ZOE Broadcasting Network, the broadcast media arm of Jesus Is Lord Church Worldwide, in partnership with ABS-CBN Corporation as its main content provider through a blocktime agreement.

Entries.Title: UNBEATEN
Entries.Description: Unbeaten is a 24/7 linear sports channel that features the best live sports, behind the scenes access and original programming.

Entries.Title: Animax
Entries.Description: Animax Broadcast Japan Inc. (Japanese: アニマックス, Hepburn: Animakkusu), stylized as ANIMAX in all caps, is a Japanese animation satellite television network, dedicated to broadcasting anime programming. Launched on July 1, 1998, Animax is the first 24-hour network in the world dedicated to anime.

Entries.Title: Discovery Asia
Entries.Description: Discovery Channel is a pay television channel that features documentary programming.

Entries.Title: GMA PINOY TV
Entries.Description: GMA Pinoy TV is a Philippine pay television channel that was launched in March 2005, by GMA Network. Operated by its subsidiaries, GMA International and GMA Worldwide Inc, it is targeted towards the Filipino diaspora.

Entries.Title: Pinoy Box Office
Entries.Description: Pinoy Box Office (PBO) is a 24-hour Filipino cable television network.

Entries.Title: CINEMA ONE
Entries.Description: Cinema One is a Philippine pay television channel targeted to the Filipino diaspora. It is owned and operated by Creative Programs, a subsidiary of the media conglomerate ABS-CBN Corporation. Its programming includes a lineup of mainstream and independent local and foreign films, film-related programming, and original content for television.

Entries.Title: Cine Mo!
Entries.Description: Cine Mo! is a Filipino pay television channel owned by ABS-CBN.

Entries.Title: Celestial Movies Pinoy
Entries.Description: Celestial Movies Pinoy is a Filipino-dubbed movie channel.

Entries.Title: KIX
Entries.Description: KIX is a Southeast Asian pay television channel owned by Celestial Tiger Entertainment.

Entries.Title: ROCK Action
Entries.Description: ROCK Action is a Southeast Asian pay television channel that features action-packed movies and series.

Entries.Title: TVN
Entries.Description: Korean entertainment channel featuring dramas and variety shows.

Entries.Title: RPTV
Entries.Description: News and public affairs channel.

Entries.Title: MPTV
Entries.Description: Entertainment channel featuring movies and series.

Entries.Title: One Sports Plus
Entries.Description: Sports channel featuring local and international events.

Entries.Title: One PH
Entries.Description: News and public affairs channel.

Entries.Title: Lotus Macau
Entries.Description: Macau-based entertainment channel.

Entries.Title: IBC13
Entries.Description: Philippine free-to-air television network.

Entries.Title: PTV4
Entries.Description: Philippine government-owned news and public affairs channel.

Entries.Title: Warner TV
Entries.Description: Warner Bros. entertainment channel featuring series and movies.

Entries.Title: ANC
Entries.Description: ABS-CBN News Channel, providing 24/7 news coverage.

Entries.Title: KAPAMILYA
Entries.Description: Kapamilya Channel is a 24-hour Filipino pay television network owned and operated by ABS-CBN Corporation, a subsidiary of Lopez Holdings Corporation. Its headquarters is located at the ABS-CBN Broadcasting Center in Quezon City and serves as the primary television network of ABS-CBN Corporation.
